summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 64 • Sleep 65 • Strain 27%

Read
Overnight recovery is better than recent pattern, while output is still lighter than your usual day. Breakfast gave the day a solid protein start, but the afternoon now runs on a widening energy gap. This favors measured muscle-preserving intake over added intensity.

Steady, not forceful.

Performance: Steady, not forceful.
